metadata.source: MOH + CCHI + SFDA + CBAHI + SCFHS + PDPL
metadata.source_ar: وزارة الصحة + مجلس الضمان الصحي + هيئة الغذاء والدواء + المركز السعودي لاعتماد المنشآت الصحية + الهيئة السعودية للتخصصات الصحية + نظام حماية البيانات الشخصية
metadata.notes: Saudi healthcare sector regulations, licensing, staffing, and compliance requirements as of Q1 2025. Covers MOH facility licensing, CCHI insurance, SFDA medical devices, CBAHI accreditation, and telemedicine.

moh_facility_licenses.notes: All private healthcare facilities require MOH licensing via the Seha platform (seha.sa). Facilities must also register with CBAHI for accreditation.

requirements: Commercial Registration (CR) with healthcare activity code
Municipal license from Balady for healthcare facility
Building completion certificate meeting MOH facility standards
Fire safety certificate from Civil Defense
Medical director with valid SCFHS classification
Medical waste management contract with approved provider
required_documents: السجل التجاري - Commercial Registration
الرخصة البلدية - Municipal License
شهادة إتمام البناء - Building Completion Certificate
شهادة الدفاع المدني - Civil Defense Certificate
عقد إدارة النفايات الطبية - Medical Waste Contract
عقد المدير الطبي - Medical Director Contract
خطة التوظيف - Staffing Plan
مخططات المنشأة الهندسية - Facility Engineering Plans
items.notes_ar: يجب ألا يقل عدد الأسرة عن 50 سريراً. يشترط وجود أقسام الطوارئ والعمليات والتنويم والصيدلية والمختبر والأشعة
items.notes_en: Minimum 50 beds. Must include emergency, surgical, inpatient, pharmacy, laboratory, and radiology departments. CBAHI accreditation required within 2 years of operation.

requirements: Minimum 3 consultants in the declared specialty with SCFHS classification
Fellowship-trained medical director in the relevant specialty
required_documents: جميع وثائق المستشفى العام - All General Hospital documents
شهادات التخصص للأطباء - Specialty Board Certifications
قائمة الأجهزة التخصصية - Specialty Equipment Inventory
بروتوكولات العلاج التخصصية - Specialty Treatment Protocols
items.notes_ar: يشمل مستشفيات العيون والأسنان والنفسية والتأهيل وأمراض القلب وغيرها. يشترط حد أدنى 30 سريراً
items.notes_en: Includes ophthalmology, dental, psychiatric, rehabilitation, cardiac, and other specialty hospitals. Minimum 30 beds required.

requirements: Commercial Registration with polyclinic activity code
Qualified medical director with SCFHS classification
required_documents: السجل التجاري - Commercial Registration
الرخصة البلدية - Municipal License
عقد المدير الطبي - Medical Director Contract
قائمة التخصصات الطبية - List of Medical Specialties
شهادات الأطباء المصنفين - SCFHS Classified Physician Certificates
items.notes_ar: يجب أن يضم 4 تخصصات طبية على الأقل مع صيدلية ومختبر داخلي
items.notes_en: Must offer at least 4 medical specialties with on-site pharmacy and lab. Day-surgery capability optional but requires separate approval.

requirements: Licensed physician with SCFHS classification in the declared specialty
required_documents: السجل التجاري - Commercial Registration
الرخصة البلدية - Municipal License
شهادة تصنيف الطبيب - SCFHS Classification Certificate
عقد إيجار أو ملكية الموقع - Lease or Ownership Document
items.notes_ar: عيادة تخصص واحد مثل عيادة جلدية أو عيادة عيون. لا يسمح بإجراء عمليات جراحية كبرى
items.notes_en: Single specialty clinic such as dermatology or ophthalmology. Major surgical procedures not permitted.

requirements: Commercial Registration with dental activity code
Dental X-ray equipment license from KACST/SFDA
required_documents: السجل التجاري - Commercial Registration
الرخصة البلدية - Municipal License
شهادة تصنيف طبيب الأسنان - Dentist SCFHS Classification
ترخيص أجهزة الأشعة - Radiology Equipment License
بروتوكول مكافحة العدوى - Infection Control Protocol
items.notes_ar: يشترط وجود غرفة تعقيم منفصلة وأجهزة أشعة مرخصة. يجب الالتزام بمعايير مكافحة العدوى
items.notes_en: Requires separate sterilization room and licensed radiology equipment. Must comply with MOH infection control standards.

requirements: Commercial Registration with pharmacy activity code
Licensed pharmacist with SCFHS classification as pharmacy director
SFDA establishment license for pharmaceutical activities
Cold chain storage for temperature-sensitive medications
required_documents: السجل التجاري - Commercial Registration
الرخصة البلدية - Municipal License
شهادة تصنيف الصيدلي المدير - Pharmacist Director SCFHS Classification
ترخيص منشأة هيئة الغذاء والدواء - SFDA Establishment License
شهادة نظام التبريد - Cold Chain Compliance Certificate
items.notes_ar: يجب أن لا تقل مساحة الصيدلية عن 48 متراً مربعاً مع وجود صيدلي سعودي مدير
items.notes_en: Minimum 48 sqm floor area. Must have a Saudi pharmacist as director. SFDA registration for drug dispensing required.

requirements: Commercial Registration with laboratory activity code
Laboratory director with SCFHS classification in clinical pathology
Biosafety level compliance based on test scope
required_documents: السجل التجاري - Commercial Registration
الرخصة البلدية - Municipal License
شهادة تصنيف مدير المختبر - Lab Director SCFHS Classification
شهادات معايرة الأجهزة - Equipment Calibration Certificates
خطة إدارة الجودة - Quality Management Plan
عقد النفايات الطبية - Medical Waste Contract
items.notes_ar: يشترط وجود أخصائي أمراض سريرية مصنف كمدير للمختبر. يوصى بالحصول على اعتماد ISO 15189
items.notes_en: Must have a classified clinical pathologist as lab director. ISO 15189 accreditation recommended. Scope of tests determines biosafety requirements.

requirements: Commercial Registration with optical services activity code
required_documents: السجل التجاري - Commercial Registration
الرخصة البلدية - Municipal License
شهادة تصنيف أخصائي البصريات - Optometrist SCFHS Classification
قائمة الأجهزة البصرية - Optical Equipment Inventory
items.notes_ar: يشترط وجود أخصائي بصريات مصنف. لا يسمح بإجراء فحوصات طبية للعيون بدون طبيب عيون مرخص
items.notes_en: Requires classified optometrist. Medical eye examinations require a licensed ophthalmologist. Contact lens fitting requires additional certification.

requirements: Commercial Registration with rehabilitation activity code
Licensed physiotherapist or rehabilitation physician as director with SCFHS classification
required_documents: السجل التجاري - Commercial Registration
الرخصة البلدية - Municipal License
شهادة تصنيف المدير الطبي - Director SCFHS Classification
قائمة أجهزة التأهيل - Rehabilitation Equipment List
شهادة سهولة الوصول - Accessibility Compliance Certificate
items.notes_ar: يشمل العلاج الطبيعي والوظيفي والتأهيل النفسي. يشترط تصميم المنشأة لذوي الإعاقة
items.notes_en: Covers physical therapy, occupational therapy, and psychological rehabilitation. Facility must be fully accessible for persons with disabilities.

requirements: Commercial Registration with telemedicine/health IT activity code
PDPL (Personal Data Protection Law) compliance certification
Data hosting within Saudi Arabia (or approved jurisdiction)
required_documents: السجل التجاري - Commercial Registration
ترخيص خدمات الطب عن بُعد - Telemedicine Service License
شهادة الامتثال لنظام حماية البيانات - PDPL Compliance Certificate
شهادة هيئة الاتصالات - CITC Compliance Certificate
وثيقة أمن المعلومات - Information Security Document
عقد استضافة البيانات - Data Hosting Agreement
items.notes_ar: يجب استضافة البيانات الصحية داخل المملكة. يشترط التشفير الكامل للاتصالات وتوافق مع نظام حماية البيانات الشخصية
items.notes_en: Health data must be hosted in Saudi Arabia. End-to-end encryption mandatory. Must comply with PDPL and MOH telemedicine practice guidelines issued in 2021.

cchi_insurance_categories.authority: CCHI - Council of Cooperative Health Insurance
cchi_insurance_categories.notes: All private sector employers must provide health insurance for employees and dependents under the Cooperative Health Insurance Law (Royal Decree M/10, 1999). CCHI defines minimum benefit categories.

categories.notes_ar: أعلى فئة تشمل تغطية شاملة مع غرفة خاصة وعلاج دولي
categories.notes_en: Highest tier with comprehensive coverage including private room, international treatment, dental, and optical.

categories.notes_ar: تغطية شاملة داخل المملكة مع أسنان وبصريات بدون غرفة خاصة
categories.notes_en: Comprehensive domestic coverage with dental and optical. Shared room accommodation. No international coverage.

categories.notes_ar: تغطية أساسية للعلاج الداخلي والخارجي والأمومة بدون أسنان وبصريات
categories.notes_en: Core inpatient/outpatient and maternity coverage. No dental or optical. Shared room accommodation.

categories.notes_ar: الحد الأدنى الإلزامي من التغطية وفقاً لوثيقة الضمان الصحي الموحدة
categories.notes_en: Minimum mandatory coverage per the Unified Health Insurance Policy. Most common category for blue-collar workers. Coverage limit SAR 500,000 per person per year.

categories.notes_ar: تأمين إلزامي لحاملي تأشيرات الزيارة. يغطي الطوارئ والحالات الحرجة
categories.notes_en: Mandatory insurance for visit visa holders. Covers emergency and critical care only.

employer_obligations.notes_en: Private sector employers must insure all employees and eligible dependents. Non-compliance results in fines and suspension of government services (Iqama renewal, exit/re-entry visas).
employer_obligations.notes_ar: يلتزم صاحب العمل في القطاع الخاص بالتأمين على جميع العاملين ومن يعولونهم. عدم الالتزام يؤدي لغرامات وإيقاف خدمات حكومية

sfda_medical_devices.sector_name_en: SFDA Medical Device Classification and Import
sfda_medical_devices.authority: SFDA - Saudi Food and Drug Authority
sfda_medical_devices.notes: Medical devices must be registered with SFDA before import or sale. Classification follows GHTF/IMDRF risk-based system adopted by SFDA in the Medical Devices Interim Regulation (2017, updated 2023).

requirements: Free sale certificate from country of origin
device_classes.notes_en: Lowest risk class. Listing-based registration (notification). No clinical data required.
Requires ISO 13485 QMS certification and risk analysis. Verification-based registration.

requirements: Notified body or regulatory approval from reference country (FDA, CE, PMDA, TGA, Health Canada)
device_classes.notes_en: Requires clinical evidence and post-market surveillance. Prior approval from at least one recognized reference regulatory authority.

requirements: Saudi-specific clinical data may be requested
device_classes.notes_en: Highest risk class requiring full clinical investigation data. SFDA may require additional Saudi-specific clinical data. Extended review timeline.
IVDs classified separately under SFDA IVD regulation. Risk-based classification (Class A through D). Performance evaluation studies required.

healthcare_staffing.notes: Based on MOH licensing standards and CBAHI accreditation requirements. SCFHS (Saudi Commission for Health Specialties) classification is mandatory for all clinical staff practicing in Saudi Arabia.

staffing_ratios.description_en: Minimum 1 physician per 5 inpatient beds. Includes all specialties on staff.
staffing_ratios.description_ar: طبيب واحد على الأقل لكل 5 أسرة تنويم. يشمل جميع التخصصات

staffing_ratios.description_en: Minimum 1 intensivist per 2 ICU beds. 24/7 physician coverage required.
staffing_ratios.description_ar: طبيب عناية مركزة واحد على الأقل لكل سريرين. تغطية طبية على مدار الساعة

staffing_ratios.description_en: Minimum 1 registered nurse per 4 patients in general inpatient wards.
staffing_ratios.description_ar: ممرض مسجل واحد على الأقل لكل 4 مرضى في أجنحة التنويم العامة

staffing_ratios.description_en: 1:1 nurse-to-patient ratio in ICU. Must be critical care trained.
staffing_ratios.description_ar: ممرض واحد لكل مريض في العناية المركزة. يشترط التدريب على الرعاية الحرجة

staffing_ratios.description_en: Minimum 1 pharmacist per 50 beds for hospital pharmacies. 24/7 pharmacy coverage required for hospitals.
staffing_ratios.description_ar: صيدلي واحد على الأقل لكل 50 سريراً. تغطية صيدلانية على مدار الساعة

roles.notes_en: Retail pharmacy director must be Saudi. Community pharmacies require 80% Saudi pharmacists by 2025 target.
Progressive Saudization target for dentistry sector.
High Saudization target for optical sector. Optical centers must have Saudi optometrist.
Gradual increase target. Nursing historically has lower Saudization due to workforce availability.
Lower target due to reliance on international medical graduates. Target increasing annually.
Administrative and non-clinical roles have higher Saudization targets.

average_salaries_sar.sector_name_en: Average Monthly Salaries for Healthcare Staff (SAR)
average_salaries_sar.notes: Market averages for private sector healthcare in major Saudi cities (Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam). Actual salaries vary by experience, facility size, and nationality.

cbahi_accreditation.sector_name_ar: اعتماد المركز السعودي لاعتماد المنشآت الصحية
cbahi_accreditation.sector_name_en: CBAHI Accreditation (Central Board for Accreditation of Healthcare Institutions)
cbahi_accreditation.notes: CBAHI accreditation is mandatory for all private healthcare facilities in Saudi Arabia as per Council of Ministers Resolution No. 17 (2014). CBAHI standards are aligned with ISQua (International Society for Quality in Health Care).

accreditation_types.notes_en: Comprehensive survey covering 810 standards across patient care, safety, governance, infection control, and facility management.

accreditation_types.applicable_to: Polyclinics, medical complexes, single specialty clinics
accreditation_types.notes_en: Covers 490 standards for ambulatory care settings including patient rights, clinical care, and safety.
Covers 320 standards specific to dental care including infection control, radiology safety, and patient care.

process_steps: Gap analysis and corrective action planning
Formal survey by CBAHI surveyor team (3-5 days on-site)

telemedicine_regulations.reference: MOH Telemedicine Regulations (2021), PDPL (Royal Decree M/19, 2021, effective March 2023)
telemedicine_regulations.notes: Saudi Arabia issued comprehensive telemedicine regulations in 2021 under MOH. The Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL) governs health data privacy. CITC regulates telecommunications infrastructure.

licensing_requirements.requirement_ar: ترخيص مقدم خدمة الطب عن بُعد من وزارة الصحة
licensing_requirements.notes_en: Separate license category from physical facility licenses. Application via Seha platform.

licensing_requirements.requirement_ar: تصنيف جميع الأطباء في الهيئة السعودية للتخصصات الصحية
licensing_requirements.requirement_en: SCFHS Classification for All Practicing Physicians
licensing_requirements.notes_en: All physicians providing telemedicine must hold valid SCFHS professional classification. Cross-border practice requires additional approval.

licensing_requirements.requirement_ar: تعيين مدير طبي مقيم في المملكة
licensing_requirements.notes_en: Medical director must be physically based in Saudi Arabia with valid SCFHS classification.
Must comply with the Personal Data Protection Law including data minimization, purpose limitation, consent management, and breach notification within 72 hours.

platform_technical_requirements.requirement_ar: تشفير الاتصالات من طرف إلى طرف

platform_technical_requirements.requirement_en: Health Data Hosting in Saudi Arabia
platform_technical_requirements.standard: Data residency within KSA borders or NCA-approved jurisdiction

platform_technical_requirements.requirement_ar: نظام سجلات طبية إلكترونية متوافق مع معايير HL7
platform_technical_requirements.standard: HL7 FHIR or HL7 v2 interoperability
Integration with Absher or National ID verification

platform_technical_requirements.requirement_ar: تسجيل وحفظ الجلسات الطبية عن بُعد
شهادة الأمن السيبراني من الهيئة الوطنية للأمن السيبراني

prohibited_services: Controlled substance prescriptions (narcotics, psychotropics) without in-person visit
Initial diagnosis of complex conditions requiring physical examination

pdpl_compliance.authority: SDAIA - Saudi Data and AI Authority

key_requirements.requirement_en: Explicit consent for health data collection and processing
key_requirements.requirement_ar: الموافقة الصريحة لجمع ومعالجة البيانات الصحية

key_requirements.requirement_en: Data minimization - collect only necessary health information
key_requirements.requirement_ar: تقليل البيانات - جمع المعلومات الصحية الضرورية فقط

key_requirements.requirement_en: Purpose limitation - use data only for declared medical purposes
key_requirements.requirement_ar: تحديد الغرض - استخدام البيانات للأغراض الطبية المعلنة فقط

key_requirements.requirement_en: Data breach notification to SDAIA within 72 hours
key_requirements.requirement_ar: إبلاغ الهيئة بأي خرق للبيانات خلال 72 ساعة

key_requirements.requirement_en: Right of data subject to access, correct, and delete personal health data
key_requirements.requirement_ar: حق صاحب البيانات في الوصول إلى بياناته الصحية وتصحيحها وحذفها

key_requirements.requirement_en: Cross-border data transfer restrictions - requires SDAIA approval
key_requirements.requirement_ar: قيود نقل البيانات عبر الحدود - يتطلب موافقة الهيئة

penalties.notes_en: Fines up to SAR 5 million and/or imprisonment up to 2 years for violations. Health data classified as sensitive personal data with stricter protections.
